ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrency_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded price */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week corresponding to the date */,
  "ltc_to_usdt" REAL /* Price of LTC in terms of USDT */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in price from the previous day */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in price from the previous day */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the day */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the day */,
  "volume" REAL /* Total volume traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription (e.g., free, premium) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicator if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "threshold_price" REAL /* Price threshold for triggering the alert */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicator if the alert is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the alert was created */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., above, below, equals) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of alert notifications (e.g., once, daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., price check, alert set) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity took place */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading platform */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for integration */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicator if the platform is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_platforms" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading platform */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicator if the association is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_platforms_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES trading_platforms ("platform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_platforms_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market trend analysis */,
  "market_trend" TEXT /* Description of the market trend (e.g., bullish, bearish) */,
  "analysis" TEXT /* Detailed analysis of the market trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)
